channel.title: blog on R-Ladies Baltimore
channel.description: Recent content in blog on R-Ladies Baltimore

item.title: test
item.description: Note: for an event make sure that the tags and categories are like this in the YAML front matter tags: - event - talk categories: - event - talk Come out to our MONTH event to hear talks from XX great R Ladies! Describe event briefly Visit our Meetup page for more details and to RSVP. Date: Weekday, Month 00, 201X Time: X:YYpm Speakers: XX and ZZ. Host: WW
